entry.title: New: CR 25-4 (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
Recommending ADOPTION of Resolution 25-49, CD1, to authorize the acquisition of land at 968 Limahana Place, Lahaina, Maui, Hawai‘i, comprising 24,018 square feet and identified for real property tax purposes as tax map key (2) 4-5-007:028, for an amount not to exceed $1,700,000, plus closing costs and expenses.

Disaster Recovery, International Affairs, and Planning Committee (2025-2027)

View on the council site
